question: Within the 2022-2024 fiscal years, which quarter of AMD had the lowest GAAP gross margin? What was it? At the same time, what was Intel's GAAP gross margin for that quarter? Was it the lowest quarterly GAAP gross margin in its 2022-2024 fiscal years?

Rounding errors are allowed.
